tasks.label: Tests: all (unittest discover)
tasks.command: .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v || python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v

windows.command: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v) else (python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v)

tasks.label: Web (Python): control server (start / restart)
tasks.detail: Free port 8780 if held, then run `python -m web_control` (serves /api, /heatmap/api, /holdings, /categorize, and the built SPA at /).

tasks.label: Web (SPA): npm install
tasks.detail: Install or update web/ frontend deps. Run after package.json changes.

tasks.label: Web (SPA): build
tasks.detail: TypeScript check + Vite production build into web/dist (served by python -m web_control at /).

tasks.label: Web (SPA): dev (Vite, http://127.0.0.1:5173)
tasks.detail: Start Vite dev server with HMR. Proxies /api, /heatmap/api, /heatmap/detail, /categorize, /holdings to the Python control server on :8780. Long-running; use the kill task or VS Code's terminal stop to end it.

tasks.label: Web: kill dev ports (8780 + 5173)
tasks.detail: Stop any process listening on 8780 (Python control) and 5173 (Vite). Cross-platform; a no-op when the ports are already free.
tasks.command: for p in 8780 5173; do lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null | xargs -r kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; done; echo 'Freed ports 8780 + 5173'

windows.command: foreach ($p in @(8780, 5173)) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($null -ne $c) { $c | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; Write-Host 'Freed ports 8780 + 5173'

tasks.label: Web: full dev (start Python + Vite)
tasks.detail: Start the Python control server and Vite dev server side-by-side. Open http://127.0.0.1:5173/ for HMR.

tasks.label: Web: full dev (restart all)
tasks.detail: Free 8780 + 5173, then start the Python control server and Vite dev server. Use this to recover from stuck servers.
